narrative:
Coventry Twp D (precinct in Summit County) has 933 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.4 percentage points.
